source_clause_title: 1.1 Contract Definitions.  The following terms, when used herein with initial

entities.name: City of San Jose
entities.legal_role: Party receiving performance and benefits under the Agreement.
entities.evidence_quote: "Buyer" means City of San Jose, a California municipality.

entities.name: Seller
entities.legal_role: Party obligated to perform under the Agreement, including delivering Facility Energy.
entities.evidence_quote: "Seller" has the meaning set forth on the Cover Sheet.

entities.name: Guarantor
entities.legal_role: Person providing a guaranty for the benefit of Buyer to support Seller's obligations.
entities.evidence_quote: "Guarantor" means, with respect to Seller, a Person ... executes and delivers a Guaranty for the benefit of Buyer.

entities.name: Guaranty
entities.legal_role: Guaranty instrument provided by Guarantor for Buyer's benefit.
entities.evidence_quote: "Guaranty" means a guaranty from a Guarantor provided for the benefit of Buyer substantially in the form attached as Exhibit L.

entities.name: Non-Defaulting Party
entities.legal_role: Party not in breach entitled to recover Costs and Losses upon termination.
entities.evidence_quote: "Non-Defaulting Party" has the meaning set forth in Section 11.2.

entities.name: Defaulting Party
entities.legal_role: Party in breach triggering termination and damages rights.
entities.evidence_quote: "Defaulting Party" has the meaning set forth in Section 11.1(a).

entities.name: Claim
entities.legal_role: A demand or assertion of a right under the Agreement.
entities.evidence_quote: "Claim" has the meaning set forth in Section 16.2.

entities.name: Event of Default
entities.legal_role: Event triggering default rights and remedies under the Agreement.
entities.evidence_quote: "Event of Default" has the meaning set forth in Section 11.1.

entities.name: Party sending Notice
entities.legal_role: Party obligated to send written communications under the Agreement.
entities.evidence_quote: "Notice" shall, unless otherwise specified in the Agreement, mean written communications by a Party to be delivered by hand delivery, United States mail, overnight courier service, or electronic messaging (e-mail).

entities.name: Party receiving Notice
entities.legal_role: Party entitled to receive written communications under the Agreement.
entities.evidence_quote: "Notice" shall, unless otherwise specified in the Agreement, mean written communications by a Party to be delivered by hand delivery, United States mail, overnight courier service, or electronic messaging (e-mail).

entities.name: Lender
entities.legal_role: Entity providing financing or refinancing for the Facility or Seller.
entities.evidence_quote: "Lender" means, collectively, any Person ... providing senior or subordinated construction, interim, back leverage or long-term debt, equity or tax equity financing or refinancing for or in connection with the development, construction, purchase, installation or operation of the Facility...

entities.name: Governmental Authority
entities.legal_role: Governmental entity with authority to bind a Party at law.
entities.evidence_quote: "Governmental Authority" means any federal, state, provincial, local or municipal government, any political subdivision thereof or any other governmental, congressional or parliamentary, regulatory, or judicial instrumentality, authority, body, agency, department, bureau, or entity with authority to bind a Party at law...

entities.name: California Independent System Operator Corporation (CAISO)
entities.legal_role: Regulatory and operational authority over the electric system relevant to the Facility.
entities.evidence_quote: "CAISO" means the California Independent System Operator Corporation.

entities.name: Facility
entities.legal_role: The Generating Facility and optionally the Storage Facility delivering energy under the Agreement.
entities.evidence_quote: "Facility" means the Generating Facility and, following Seller’s exercise of its option to add an integrated energy storage facility pursuant to Section 2.3, the Storage Facility.

entities.name: Generating Facility
entities.legal_role: Solar photovoltaic generating facility delivering PV Energy to the Delivery Point.
entities.evidence_quote: "Generating Facility" means the solar photovoltaic generating facility described on the Cover Sheet and in Exhibit A, located at the Site...

entities.name: Storage Facility
entities.legal_role: Energy storage facility delivering Discharging Energy to the Delivery Point.
entities.evidence_quote: "Storage Facility" means, following Seller’s exercise of its option to add an integrated energy storage facility pursuant to Section 2.3, the energy storage facility described in Exhibit A...

entities.name: Delivery Point
entities.legal_role: Point where Facility Energy is delivered and measured.
entities.evidence_quote: "Delivery Point" has the meaning set forth in Exhibit A.

entities.name: Cover Sheet
entities.legal_role: Part of the Agreement defining key terms including Buyer, Seller, Contract Price, and Milestones.
entities.evidence_quote: "Cover Sheet" means the cover sheet to this Agreement, which is incorporated into this Agreement.

entities.name: Agreement
entities.legal_role: The contract including Preamble, Exhibits, schedules, and supplements between the Parties.
entities.evidence_quote: "Agreement" has the meaning set forth in the Preamble and includes any Exhibits, schedules and any written supplements hereto, the Cover Sheet, and any designated collateral, credit support or similar arrangement between the Parties.

entities.name: Party
entities.legal_role: A contracting entity under the Agreement.
entities.evidence_quote: "Party" or "Parties" has the meaning set forth in the Preamble.

relationships.legal_significance: Seller is obligated to perform and deliver Facility Energy and other contractual obligations to Buyer.
relationships.evidence_quote: "Seller" ... delivers Facility Energy to the Delivery Point ... for Buyer.

relationships.legal_significance: Guarantor provides a guaranty for the benefit of Buyer securing Seller's obligations.
relationships.evidence_quote: "Guarantor" ... executes and delivers a Guaranty for the benefit of Buyer.

relationships.legal_significance: Guaranty instrument benefits Buyer by securing Seller's performance.
relationships.evidence_quote: "Guaranty" means a guaranty from a Guarantor provided for the benefit of Buyer.

relationships.legal_significance: Non-Defaulting Party may recover Costs and Losses from Defaulting Party upon termination.
relationships.evidence_quote: "Costs" means, with respect to the Non-Defaulting Party ... reasonably incurred ... in terminating the Agreement.

relationships.legal_significance: Party sending Notice must deliver written communications to the other Party.
relationships.evidence_quote: "Notice" shall ... mean written communications by a Party to be delivered ... to the other Party.

relationships.legal_significance: Lender provides financing or refinancing to Seller for the Facility.
relationships.evidence_quote: "Lender" means ... providing ... financing or refinancing ... for ... Seller.

relationships.legal_significance: Governmental Authority has legal power to bind a Party at law.
relationships.evidence_quote: "Governmental Authority" ... with authority to bind a Party at law.

relationships.legal_significance: CAISO regulates and operates the electric system affecting the Parties' performance.
relationships.evidence_quote: "CAISO" means the California Independent System Operator Corporation.

relationships.legal_significance: Facility delivers electrical energy to the Delivery Point as required under the Agreement.
relationships.evidence_quote: "Facility" ... deliver(s) ... Energy to the Delivery Point.

relationships.legal_significance: Generating Facility is a component of the Facility.
relationships.evidence_quote: "Facility" means the Generating Facility and ... the Storage Facility.

relationships.legal_significance: Storage Facility is a component of the Facility following Seller's option exercise.
relationships.evidence_quote: "Facility" means the Generating Facility and, following Seller’s exercise of its option ... the Storage Facility.

relationships.legal_significance: Cover Sheet is incorporated into and forms part of the Agreement.
relationships.evidence_quote: "Cover Sheet" means the cover sheet to this Agreement, which is incorporated into this Agreement.

relationships.legal_significance: Parties are contracting entities bound by the Agreement.
relationships.evidence_quote: "Party" or "Parties" has the meaning set forth in the Preamble.

extractor_notes: This clause is a definitions section establishing key terms and roles but does not specify explicit obligations or duties beyond definitions. Entities such as Buyer, Seller, Guarantor, and Non-Defaulting/Defaulting Parties are identified with their legal roles. Relationships are inferred from definitions and standard contract structure but no explicit performance or indemnity obligations are stated here.

source_clause_title: 14.2 Collateral Assignment.  Subject to the provisions of this Section 14.2, Seller has

entities.name: Seller
entities.legal_role: Party granting the right to assign the Agreement as collateral and subject to cure obligations and defaults.
entities.evidence_quote: Seller has the right to assign this Agreement as collateral for any financing or refinancing of the Facility.

entities.name: Buyer
entities.legal_role: Party entitled to receive notices, approve amendments, and exercise termination rights subject to cure periods.
entities.evidence_quote: Buyer shall in good faith work with Seller and Lender... Buyer shall give Notice of an Event of Default by Seller... Buyer may require Seller or Lender to provide to Buyer a report...

entities.name: Lender
entities.legal_role: Party receiving collateral assignment rights, with rights to cure defaults, consent to termination, approve amendments, and assume Seller’s obligations upon possession.
entities.evidence_quote: Seller and Lender to agree upon a consent to collateral assignment... Lender will have the right to cure an Event of Default... Lender will have the right to consent before any termination... Lender must assume all of Seller’s obligations...

entities.name: Event of Default by Seller
entities.legal_role: Triggering event that activates notice, cure, reporting, and termination rights under the Agreement.
entities.evidence_quote: Notice of an Event of Default by Seller... Following an Event of Default by Seller... cure an Event of Default...

entities.name: Collateral Assignment Agreement
entities.legal_role: Agreement among Buyer, Seller, and Lender governing collateral assignment rights and obligations.
entities.evidence_quote: Buyer shall in good faith work with Seller and Lender to agree upon a consent to collateral assignment of this Agreement (“Collateral Assignment Agreement”).

entities.name: Notice of Event of Default
entities.legal_role: Formal notification from Buyer to Seller and Lender triggering cure periods and potential termination rights.
entities.evidence_quote: Buyer shall give Notice of an Event of Default by Seller to the Person(s) to be specified by Lender... such notice shall be provided to Lender at the time such notice is provided to Seller

entities.name: Cure period for Event of Default
entities.legal_role: Timeframe during which Seller or Lender may remedy an Event of Default to avoid termination.
entities.evidence_quote: Lender must remedy or cure the Event of Default within the cure period under this Agreement and any additional cure periods agreed in the Collateral Assignment Agreement up to a maximum of ninety (90) days...

entities.name: Report on cure plan status
entities.legal_role: Information provided by Seller or Lender to Buyer regarding efforts and progress to cure an Event of Default.
entities.evidence_quote: Buyer may require Seller or Lender to provide to Buyer a report concerning... the status of efforts... impediments... implementation... any other information...

entities.name: Lender taking possession or title to the Facility
entities.legal_role: Event triggering Lender’s assumption of Seller’s obligations or election to cure defaults to avoid termination.
entities.evidence_quote: If Lender, directly or indirectly, takes possession of, or title to the Facility... Lender must assume all of Seller’s obligations... provided... Lender may elect to either cause such Event of Default to be cured, or not assume this Agreement

entities.name: Permitted Transferee
entities.legal_role: Entity meeting defined criteria to which Lender may transfer or sell the Facility and assign obligations.
entities.evidence_quote: Such sale or transfer may be made only to an entity that (i) meets the definition of Permitted Transferee and (ii) is an entity that Buyer is permitted to contract with under applicable Law

entities.name: Replacement agreement with Buyer
entities.legal_role: Agreement Lender may enter into with Buyer after Seller’s bankruptcy rejection or termination, with substantially same terms as original Agreement.
entities.evidence_quote: Lender shall have the right to elect... to enter into a replacement agreement with Buyer having substantially the same terms as this Agreement

relationships.legal_significance: Seller grants the right to assign the Agreement as collateral governed by the Collateral Assignment Agreement.
relationships.evidence_quote: Seller has the right to assign this Agreement as collateral for any financing or refinancing of the Facility.

relationships.evidence_quote: Buyer shall in good faith work with Seller and Lender to agree upon a consent to collateral assignment of this Agreement

relationships.evidence_quote: Buyer shall in good faith work with Seller and Lender to agree upon a consent to collateral assignment of this Agreement

relationships.legal_significance: Buyer must give notice of Seller’s Event of Default to Seller and Lender before termination.
relationships.evidence_quote: Buyer shall give Notice of an Event of Default by Seller to the Person(s) to be specified by Lender... before exercising its right to terminate this Agreement

relationships.evidence_quote: such notice shall be provided to Lender at the time such notice is provided to Seller

relationships.legal_significance: Lender may cure Event of Default within specified cure periods to avoid termination.
relationships.evidence_quote: Lender must remedy or cure the Event of Default within the cure period under this Agreement and any additional cure periods agreed in the Collateral Assignment Agreement

relationships.legal_significance: Buyer may require Seller or Lender to provide reports on cure plan status after Event of Default.
relationships.evidence_quote: Buyer may require Seller or Lender to provide to Buyer a report concerning... the status of efforts... impediments... implementation...

relationships.legal_significance: Seller must provide cure plan reports to Buyer upon request after Event of Default.

relationships.legal_significance: Lender must provide cure plan reports to Buyer upon request after Event of Default.
relationships.evidence_quote: Seller or Lender must provide the report to Buyer within ten (10) Business Days after Notice from Buyer requesting the report

relationships.legal_significance: Lender must consent before any termination of the Agreement not arising from an Event of Default.
relationships.evidence_quote: Lender will have the right to consent before any termination of this Agreement which does not arise out of an Event of Default

relationships.legal_significance: Lender must approve material amendments to the Agreement, with approval not unreasonably withheld.
relationships.evidence_quote: Lender will receive prior Notice of and the right to approve material amendments to this Agreement, which approval will not be unreasonably withheld

relationships.legal_significance: Upon taking possession or title to the Facility, Lender assumes Seller’s obligations under the Agreement.
relationships.evidence_quote: Lender must assume all of Seller’s obligations arising under this Agreement and all related agreements

relationships.evidence_quote: Lender at its option... may elect to... (ii) Not assume this Agreement

relationships.legal_significance: Lender must cause transferee or buyer to assume Seller’s obligations as condition of sale or transfer.
relationships.evidence_quote: Lender must cause the transferee or buyer to assume all of Seller’s obligations... as a condition of the sale or transfer

relationships.legal_significance: Lender may elect to enter into a replacement agreement with Buyer after Seller’s bankruptcy rejection or termination.
relationships.evidence_quote: Lender shall have the right to elect... to enter into a replacement agreement with Buyer having substantially the same terms as this Agreement

relationships.evidence_quote: promptly after Lender’s written request, Buyer must enter into such replacement agreement

extractor_notes: This clause establishes a tripartite collateral assignment framework among Seller, Buyer, and Lender, detailing cure rights, notice obligations, and assumption of obligations by Lender upon possession or bankruptcy events. The Lender’s rights to cure, consent, and replace Seller are carefully conditioned and time-limited.
